items.claim: Royval is older than the typical flyweight fighter.
items.quote: Royval is a bit older now for flyweight.

items.claim: Royval has absorbed a significant amount of damage in his career.
items.quote: he's taken a lot of damage

items.claim: Royval's high-volume striking style makes him vulnerable when exiting the pocket with his hands down.
items.quote: if you're just kind of be entering and exiting the pocket and as you're exiting the pocket, you're dropping your hands, Royval is just going to be throwing four to five punch combinations.

items.claim: Lona Kevana possesses enough power to knock out Royval.
items.quote: I think Lona Kevana just hits hard enough to to hurt Royval and knock him out

items.claim: Royval has not been active in his grappling training recently.
Sandhagen is a highly dynamic striker who excels at downloading data during fights.
items.quote: He's so dynamic on the feet... He's so good at downloading data in his fights.

items.claim: Sandhagen has evolved his game to include effective offensive wrestling.
items.quote: as he's progressed his career, he started to evolve his game to become more well-rounded. He offensively wrestles

items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis has visible skin lesions on his ankles that may be staph infection.
items.quote: There is photos of him with staff on his ankles.

items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis's striking is superior to Paddy Pimblett's.
items.quote: I do actually think that Buwasa Tonee on the feet is going to be miles above Paddy Pimblett

items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis leaves his head exposed during takedown entries.
items.quote: he does leave his head exposed in the takedown entries.

items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis has shown a struggle when fighting from the bottom position.
items.quote: we have seen Buwasa struggle when he's the one in bottom position before

items.claim: Max Holloway has superior cardio compared to Conor McGregor.
items.quote: I can trust Holloway to have the better cardio out of these two guys.

items.claim: Conor McGregor is 38 years old and has been inactive for several years.
items.quote: McGregor's 38 years old now. He hasn't fought for years.
